title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at HP India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at HP India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at HP India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About HP India:
HP India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India!
jsonLd.skills: Rust, JavaScript, SQL, Kubernetes, AWS, Python, Microservices, TensorFlow
